provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: These Rules may be cited as the Petroleum (Licensing Fees) Rules, 2020.

provisions.title: Application
provisions.content: These Rules shall apply in respect of fees payable for— construction approval; and licensing of petroleum installations and petroleum supply operations.

provisions.title: Construction approval and licensing fees
provisions.content: (1) The construction approval fees for various types of construction specified in the Second Column of the First Schedule to these Rules shall be as provided in the Third Column of that Schedule, and the duration for which the approval shall operate shall be as specified in the Fourth Column of that Schedule. (2) The fees in respect of application, transfer, amendment, change of name or acquisition of duplicate copy of type of licence specified in the Second Column of the Second Schedule to these Rules shall be as provided for in each corresponding columns in that Schedule, and the duration for which the specified licence is issued shall be as provided for in the Fifth Column of each corresponding type of licence. (3) The fees in respect of application, grant of construction approval and a licence with regard to petroleum operations in townships and villages shall be as prescribed in the Third Schedule to these Rules.

provisions.title: Revocation of G.N No. 721 of 2018
provisions.content: The Petroleum (Licensing Fees) Rules, 2018 are hereby revoked.
